Package nonprofitbookkeeping.service.impl

Class InMemoryTrialBalanceService

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.service.impl.InMemoryTrialBalanceService
All Implemented Interfaces:
TrialBalanceService
public class InMemoryTrialBalanceService extends Object implements TrialBalanceService
InMemoryTrialBalanceService computes a trial balance for a ledger over a specified date range. It calculates debit and credit sums for each account type and allows retrieval of these totals as well as a check for whether the ledger is balanced.

  • Constructor Details

    • InMemoryTrialBalanceService

      public InMemoryTrialBalanceService()

  • Method Details

    • compute

      public static TrialBalanceResult compute(LedgerIntf ledger, LocalDate from, LocalDate to)
      Computes a trial balance for the given ledger and date range. This is a static helper method.
      Parameters:
      ledger - the ledger from which transactions are retrieved.
      from - the start date for filtering transactions.
      to - the end date for filtering transactions.
      Returns:
      a TrialBalanceResult representing aggregated debit and credit amounts.

    • computeTrialBalance

      public void computeTrialBalance(LedgerIntf ledger, LocalDate from, LocalDate to)
      Computes the trial balance for the specified ledger and date range, storing the result for later retrieval.
      Parameters:
      ledger - the ledger to compute the trial balance for.
      from - the start date (inclusive).
      to - the end date (inclusive).

    • getDebitSums

      public Map getDebitSums()
      Returns the debit sums from the most recent trial balance result.
      Specified by:
      getDebitSums in interface TrialBalanceService
      Returns:
      a Map where the keys are account type names and the values are total debit amounts.

    • getCreditSums

      public Map getCreditSums()
      Returns the credit sums from the most recent trial balance result.
      Specified by:
      getCreditSums in interface TrialBalanceService
      Returns:
      a Map where the keys are account type names and the values are total credit amounts.

    • isBalanced

      public boolean isBalanced()
      Indicates whether the ledger is balanced, based on the most recent trial balance result.
      Specified by:
      isBalanced in interface TrialBalanceService
      Returns:
      true if balanced, false otherwise.
